case_title: SVETLANA YASHINA VS. YURI UNDORF D.D.S., A DENTAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-20-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SVETLANA YASHINA IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT'S CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA (#301252). DEFENDANT YURI UNDORFM D.D.S., A DENTAL CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE, RETURN CERTIFIED MAIL FILED 10-12-2022 IS INVALID. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF SVETLANA WASHINA IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA (#301252). DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S., A DENTAL CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY YASHINA, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S.,  A DENTAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YASHINA, SVETLANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: MATT GRODIN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YASHINA, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S.,  A DENTAL CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NOTE WITH RETURNED CERTIFIED MAIL: "THERE IS NO SUCH PERSON AT THIS ADDRESS". COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S.,  A DENTAL CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED NOV-30-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S.,  A DENTAL CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YASHINA, SVETLANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YURI UNDORF D.D.S.,  A DENTAL CORPORATION FAILED TO PROOFING BURDEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
